title: Jeffrey Relationship Messaging Engine
reason: Existing reminder direction does not match relationship-first WhatsApp use.
mergeArea: Jeffrey / Dashboard / Data provenance / Voice QA
expectedBenefit: Warmer, safer and more replyable member drafts with verified context.
risk: Medium: production is delivered by a separate repository and live context is browser-only.
recommendation: Integrate into hudsonmar-852/Jeffrey only with explicit authority, then complete Jeffrey voice and mobile browser review.

title: Persistent AIOS Amendment Registry
reason: High-value daily recommendations can be overlooked when they remain only in chat history.
expectedBenefit: Preserves recommendations as reviewable system assets with traceable status.
recommendation: Add to persistent discussion queue and review by priority.
